title: FramedBlocksLite
description: A fork of FramedBlocks containing only the most essential blocks for a more vanilla-themed experience.
body:
FramedBlocksLite is a fork of the [FramedBlocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks) mod by XFactHD. It contains only the more basic blocks from the original mod, intended to provide an experience that is more faithful to vanilla minecraft.

Visit the [original mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks) for a detailed description.

# Blocks
- Cube
- Slab and Double Slab
- Slab Edge
- Slab Corner
- Panel (Vertical Slab) and Double Panel
- Pillar
- Half Pillar
- Corner Pillar
- Stairs
- Half Stairs
- Vertical Stairs
- Vertical Half Stairs
- Wall
- Fence
- Fence Gate
- Door
- Iron Door
- Trapdoor
- Iron Trapdoor
- Pressure Plate
- Stone Pressure Plate
- Button
- Stone Button
- Bookshelf
- Chiseled Bookshelf

# Removed Features
- Framing Saw (All Framed Blocks are craftable via the Crafting Table)
- Intangibility
- Reinforcements
- Glowstone application (Emissive blocks will still glow as normal)
